name: Savory Meat Filled Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook manicotti according to package directions; drain. Cool in a single layer on foil.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chicken and onions. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and onions are tender.
4. Stir in 1 cup mozzarella cheese, egg whites, bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
5. Fill each cooled pasta tube with about 1/4 cup meat filling.
6. Spread a thin layer of spaghetti sauce on the bottom of a prepared 13 x 9-inch pan.
7. Place filled pasta in the prepared pan; cover with remaining sauce.
8. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella cheese.
9. Bake, covered, for 45 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
